sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: SciSparc: $9.46 Million NeuroThera Deal To Acquire Majority Stake In Quantum Clinical Trials Firm CliniQuantum
feed.summary: SciSparc's majority-owned subsidiary, NeuroThera Labs, has entered into a definitive agreement to acquire a controlling stake (54.01%) in CliniQuantum Ltd. for approximately $9.46 million in NeuroThera shares, with potential earn-out payments of up to $2.5 million. CliniQuantum specializes in using quantum computing technology to improve clinical trials. The acquisition is expected to close around March 31, 2026.

feed.title: Is Vestis (VSTS) Now An Opportunity After Recent Share Price Volatility?
feed.summary: Vestis (VSTS) stock has experienced recent volatility but appears undervalued based on two metrics. A Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) analysis suggests it is 61.5% undervalued with an intrinsic value of US$19.47, while its Price-to-Sales (P/S) ratio of 0.36x also indicates undervaluation compared to its industry. The article presents Bull and Bear case narratives for Vestis, with fair values ranging from US$6.00 to US$10.00, highlighting different perspectives on the company's future.

feed.title: UR-Energy Earnings Call Signals Early-Stage Uranium Upswing
feed.summary: UR-Energy's Q4 earnings call revealed a cautiously optimistic outlook, highlighting increased production at Lost Creek, expanded resources, and improved project economics. The company reported nearing initial production at Shirley Basin and a strong balance sheet. However, management also noted risks such as regulatory timing, plant efficiency issues, and a looming product loan, indicating that while fundamentals are improving, sustained profits depend on higher production volumes and addressing operational bottlenecks.

feed.title: Cboe Expands Prediction Markets And Bitcoin Volatility Tools For Traders
feed.summary: Cboe Global Markets introduced a new prediction market framework with partial payouts for correct event forecasts, set to launch with a Mini S&P 500 Index contract. The company also announced the BITVX Bitcoin Volatility Index, bringing VIX-style analytics to bitcoin. These new products expand Cboe's derivatives offerings, targeting broader use cases for event outcomes and digital asset risk, and are expected to go live soon pending regulatory considerations.

feed.title: MGG.DE MGM Resorts (XETRA) up 10.37% to €36.29 intraday: volume surge signals momentum
feed.summary: MGG.DE MGM Resorts saw its stock jump 10.37% to €36.29 on XETRA today, driven by a significant surge in trading volume. This movement is attributed to sector rotation into entertainment names, although technical indicators show a mixed outlook and Meyka AI's forecast suggests a potential downside risk over the next year. Investors are advised to consider the company's attractive free cash flow yield against its leverage metrics and concentrated geographic exposure.

feed.title: The Mosaic Company (MOS) call put ratio 4.1 calls to 1 put as share price up 4.9%
feed.summary: The Mosaic Company (MOS) is experiencing significant call option activity, with a call-to-put ratio of 4.1 calls for every 1 put, as its share price has increased by 4.9%. The company's 30-day option implied volatility is 61, nearing its 52-week high.

feed.title: Virtuix Extends Reduced Exercise Price Period on Warrants
feed.summary: Virtuix Holdings Inc. (VTIX) has extended a reduced exercise price period of $6.00 per share on three warrants held by Streeterville Capital, LLC until June 10, 2026. This move aims to encourage near-term warrant exercises while allowing Virtuix to regain control over pricing and prevent excessive dilution with two days' notice. The company operates in the technology and digital entertainment sector, leveraging equity and debt-linked securities for funding.

feed.title: Wearable Devices Posts 2025 Revenue Growth and Bolsters Cash as Mudra Wearables Scale Commercially
feed.summary: Wearable Devices Ltd. reported full-year 2025 results showing 23.9% revenue growth and a 28.5% rise in Mudra sales, alongside raising $24.4 million in cash, ending with $18.4 million despite an $8.1 million net loss. The company focused on global commercialization, expanding into Asia, launching developer tools, and strengthening its patent portfolio to advance its neural interface wearables for B2C and B2B markets. WLDS is currently rated Neutral by Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, citing financial weaknesses despite rapid revenue growth.

feed.title: Marathon Petroleum Corp stock hits all-time high at 228.64 USD
feed.summary: Marathon Petroleum Corp (MPC) stock has reached a new all-time high of $229.28, trading within 1% of its 52-week high, following an impressive 68.91% increase over the past year. The company's strong performance is supported by robust Q4 2025 financial results, which significantly surpassed analyst estimates, leading to several price target increases from firms like BMO Capital, Wells Fargo, and TD Cowen. InvestingPro analysis suggests the stock is undervalued despite its recent surge, highlighting strong investor confidence and strategic initiatives within the energy sector.

feed.title: Dollar General reports strong Q4 as earnings soar; same-store sales up 4.3%
feed.summary: Dollar General reported strong financial results for its fourth quarter, with earnings more than doubling and same-store sales increasing by 4.3%. The company plans to open 450 new stores in the U.S. and 10 in Mexico in fiscal 2026, alongside extensive store remodels. For the full fiscal year 2025, net sales rose 5.2% to $42.7 billion, with net income up 34.3% to $1.5 billion.

feed.title: Evercore Maintains HP Inc(HPQ.US) With Hold Rating, Maintains Target Price $20
feed.summary: Evercore analyst Amit Daryanani has reiterated a "Hold" rating for HP Inc (HPQ.US), maintaining the target price at $20. Based on TipRanks data, the analyst has a 62.4% success rate and a 22.7% average return over the past year. This rating is for informational purposes and not an investment recommendation.

feed.title: This General Mills Analyst Turns Bearish; Here Are Top 5 Downgrades For Thursday
feed.summary: This article lists the top five analyst downgrades for Thursday, March 12, 2026. General Mills (NYSE: GIS) was among the companies downgraded by Wells Fargo due to a bearish outlook, alongside Wealthfront Corp (NASDAQ: WLTH), Farmland Partners Inc. (NYSE: FPI), Conagra Brands Inc (NYSE: CAG), and Telefonica Brasil SA (NYSE: VIV). Analysts have adjusted their ratings and price targets for these companies based on their updated market assessments.

feed.title: Dollar Tree Multi Price Shift Attracts Wealthier Shoppers But Raises Profit Questions
feed.summary: Dollar Tree is expanding its pricing strategy beyond the traditional single price point, now offering items up to $7. This move has attracted 3 million new households, with 60% of these from higher-income brackets ($100,000+), indicating a significant shift in its customer base. While the stock has seen an 82.9% increase over the past year, questions remain about the impact of this increased complexity on profitability and whether the broader customer reach will offset concerns regarding returns on capital and sales trends.

feed.title: Omnicom outlines 2026 outlook: ~4% revenue growth, $1.5B synergies, $3.0–3.5B buybacks
feed.summary: Omnicom (OMC) has released its 2026 outlook, projecting approximately 4% constant-currency revenue growth and $1.5 billion in cost-reduction synergies. The company anticipates double-digit growth in Adjusted Net Income per share, plans $3.0-$3.5 billion in share repurchases, and has already initiated a $2.5 billion accelerated repurchase.

feed.title: ServiceNow AI Push In Healthcare And Agent Resilience Raises Valuation Questions
feed.summary: ServiceNow has expanded its AI presence through new partnerships with Aiva Health for voice-driven AI in healthcare and Cohesity for agent resilience within enterprise AI. These strategic moves aim to integrate ServiceNow's platform into regulated, data-sensitive environments, broadening its application for complex workloads. While these partnerships offer potential for deeper adoption, investors are left to weigh how effectively they will translate into revenue growth and impact the company's valuation, especially given its premium P/E ratio.

feed.title: Vera Bradley Picks A New CEO, Turns Profitable in Q4
feed.summary: Vera Bradley has named Ian Bickley as its new chairman and CEO, following eight months as executive chairman, during which he spearheaded the "Project Sunshine" transformation strategy. The company announced a return to profitability in Q4, with a net income of $2.66 million, though it still posted an overall loss for the year. This leadership change and improved financial performance signal progress in Vera Bradley's efforts to modernize its brand and attract a younger demographic while retaining its core customer base.

feed.title: GE Aerospace Palantir AI Push Targets Readiness And Production Efficiency
authors: Simply Wall St Reviewed by Bailey Pemberton
feed.summary: GE Aerospace and Palantir Technologies have expanded their partnership to implement advanced AI solutions for the U.S. Air Force's aviation readiness and GE's production system. This collaboration aims to enhance efficiency, support GE's manufacturing push, and address its engine backlog, while also introducing considerations of cybersecurity and integration for investors. The initiative is expected to boost GE's profit drivers but also brings risks related to complex AI systems and existing financial concerns.

feed.title: More seniors turn to glucose monitors as most Humana plans cover them in 2026
feed.summary: A new study by Humana Healthcare Research and Yale School of Medicine found a significant increase in the use of continuous glucose monitors (CGMs) among Medicare Advantage members with type 2 diabetes from 2021 to 2023. This rise, concurrent with expanded Medicare coverage, highlights the devices' clinical importance in managing diabetes, particularly for those with complex health issues. Starting in 2026, most Humana Medicare Advantage plans will fully cover CGMs at no out-of-pocket cost, making these advanced tools more accessible.

feed.title: These Prudential funds just extended a 16-year award streak for performance
feed.summary: PGIM, Prudential Financial's global investment management business, has received 2026 LSEG Lipper Fund Awards for the 16th consecutive year, recognizing its consistent strong, risk-adjusted performance. Five specific PGIM funds were honored across various categories for their outstanding performance over 3, 5, and 10-year periods. This continued recognition highlights PGIM's robust investment platform and commitment to delivering strong outcomes for clients.

feed.title: Myelofibrosis Market: Strong Pharma Growth Forecast Through 2034 – DelveInsight | Lynk Pharma, Samus Therapeutics, Taiga Biotech, Bristol-Myers Squibb, Sumitomo Pharma Oncology, Keros Therapeutics
feed.summary: The Myelofibrosis market is projected to reach USD 5,368 million by 2034, growing at a CAGR of 9.0% from 2020. The report highlights several key companies and therapies, with JAKAFI/JAKAVI (ruxolitinib) currently dominating the market. Increased R&D and rising prevalence in the elderly population are driving market growth, despite barriers such as high treatment costs.

feed.title: College tuition up 914% since 1983: J.P. Morgan guide for families
feed.summary: J.P. Morgan Asset Management has released its 13th annual College Planning Essentials guide, revealing that college tuition has increased by an alarming 914% since 1983 and student loan debt has surged 343% since 2005. The guide highlights that 60% of families do not utilize 529 plans, often resorting to tapping retirement funds, despite new flexibilities like tax-free Roth IRA rollovers. It emphasizes the critical need for early investing and strategic financial planning to combat rapidly rising higher education costs.

feed.title: Dollar General Q4 2025 Earnings: $10.91B Revenue, 4.3% Same-Store Sales Growth - News and Statistics
feed.summary: Dollar General announced its Q4 2025 financial results, reporting $10.91 billion in revenue, a 5.9% year-on-year increase that surpassed analyst expectations, and GAAP EPS of $1.93, also exceeding estimates. Same-store sales grew by 4.3%, and the company's operating margin increased to 5.6%. However, the retailer's guidance for the upcoming year's revenue growth and midpoint earnings per share is slightly below current analyst projections.

feed.title: American Electric Power (NASDAQ:AEP) Given New $139.00 Price Target at JPMorgan Chase & Co.
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. has raised its price target for American Electric Power (NASDAQ:AEP) to $139.00 from $125.00, maintaining a "neutral" rating. This adjustment indicates a potential upside of 5.90% from the stock's previous close. The firm's decision aligns with generally favorable analyst sentiment, with other firms also increasing their price targets and the consensus suggesting a "Moderate Buy" rating for AEP.

feed.title: Is Xcel Energy Stock Outperforming the Nasdaq?
feed.summary: Xcel Energy Inc. (XEL) has shown mixed performance compared to the Nasdaq Composite ($NASX). While XEL shares have risen 8.5% over the past three months and 9.7% YTD, outperforming Nasdaq's declines, its 52-week return of 17.9% lags Nasdaq's 30.3%. Analysts maintain a "Strong Buy" rating for XEL, projecting an 11% upside to its mean price target of $89.94.

feed.title: The Sherwin-Williams Company to Hold Financial Community Presentation on September 24, 2026
feed.summary: The Sherwin-Williams Company (NYSE: SHW) announced it will host its Financial Community Presentation in Cleveland, OH on September 24, 2026. The event will feature presentations from Chair, President and CEO Heidi G. Petz, Senior Vice President and CFO Benjamin E. Meisenzahl, and other senior leadership. Further registration details are expected to be released at a later date.

feed.title: Key Players in the Window Film Market - 3M Company, Eastman
feed.summary: This article highlights key players in the Window Film Market, including 3M Company, Eastman Chemical Company, Saint-Gobain Performance Plastics, Madico Inc., and Avery Dennison Corporation. It discusses their strategies focusing on innovation, R&D, and expansion, driven by increasing demand for energy efficiency, interior protection, and sustainable building solutions. The report also covers market strengths, weaknesses, opportunities, threats, investment opportunities, emerging trends, and recent developments in the sector.

feed.title: Salesforce Taps Bonds for Buybacks as Investors Demand More Yield
feed.summary: Salesforce (CRM) is conducting a $25 billion bond sale primarily to fund share buybacks, marking one of its largest debt offerings. Despite the significant issuance, investor demand was weaker than expected, leading to higher yields for buyers compared to previous offerings, reflecting concerns about increased leverage for buybacks and AI's impact on software growth. The move highlights a trend of mature corporations using cheap debt for equity enhancement, indicating the depth of the investment-grade corporate bond market.

feed.title: The Motley Fool Interviews IBM CFO Jim Kavanaugh
feed.summary: Motley Fool co-founder Tom Gardner and contributor Matt Frankel interview IBM CFO Jim Kavanaugh about the "new IBM." Kavanaugh highlights the company's transformation through a focused strategy on Hybrid Cloud, AI, and Quantum, emphasizing the creation of shareholder value and a shift to a platform-centric business model. He also discusses the role of agentic AI in driving productivity and competitive advantage, IBM's AI-driven book of business, and the strategic acquisition of Confluent.

feed.title: With Cyberattacks Surging, Does CrowdStrike or Palo Alto Networks Stand Out?
feed.summary: The cybersecurity market is projected to reach $580 billion by 2031 due to escalating cyberattacks and AI adoption. This article compares CrowdStrike and Palo Alto Networks as key investment opportunities, evaluating them based on AI positioning, platform strategy, and financial profiles. For long-term investors, CrowdStrike, with its AI-native architecture and strong growth trajectory, is presented as a higher-conviction bet, while Palo Alto Networks offers broader platform coverage and current profitability for more defensive portfolios.

feed.title: Barclays Downgrades Telefonica Brasil (NYSE:VIV) to Equal Weight
feed.summary: Barclays has downgraded Telefonica Brasil (NYSE:VIV) from "overweight" to "equal weight" with a $16.00 target price, indicating minimal upside. The company currently holds a consensus "Hold" rating from analysts, with an average price target of $13.42. This follows a recent quarter where Telefonica Brasil exceeded EPS estimates but fell short on revenue.

feed.title: F5 CEO: AI is driving urban sprawl across enterprise IT
feed.summary: F5 CEO François Locoh-Donou stated at F5 AppWorld 2026 that AI and digital sovereignty are rapidly expanding enterprise IT environments, which he likened to sprawling megacities. He noted that enterprises are managing an average of seven AI models and will deploy over a billion AI agents by 2029, increasing complexity and security challenges. F5 is addressing these issues with new capabilities under its Application Delivery and Security Platform (ADSP), focusing on API visibility, AI security, and automation for service providers.

feed.title: Conagra Brands (NYSE:CAG) Cut to Underweight at Wells Fargo & Company
feed.summary: Wells Fargo & Company downgraded Conagra Brands (NYSE:CAG) from "equal weight" to "underweight" with a $15.00 price target, citing a potential downside of 11.74%. This follows other analyst downgrades and a consensus "Reduce" rating for the stock. Conagra slightly beat EPS estimates but saw revenue decline, and its FY2026 guidance is below analyst expectations, contributing to near-term downside risks amplified by sector weakness and unusual put buying.

feed.title: Zelle and Bank of America Partner to Accelerate Delivery of Charitable Donations to Nonprofits
feed.summary: Zelle and Bank of America have partnered to launch an innovative application of Zelle to facilitate charitable disbursements from Donor Advised Funds (DAFs). This new capability, part of Zelle Forward, allows nonprofits to receive grant funding in near real-time, replacing traditional paper-based processes and accelerating access to resources, especially during urgent situations. The initial proof of concept is with Bank of America's Charitable Gift Fund, with aspirations for broader use across financial institutions offering Zelle and DAF programs.

feed.title: CSO Hall of Fame Welcomes Barry Hensley as 2026 Inductee
feed.summary: Barry Hensley, Chief Security Officer at Brown & Brown, is set to be inducted into the 2026 CSO Hall of Fame at the upcoming CSO Cybersecurity Awards & Conference in May. This recognition honors leaders who have significantly contributed to advancing information risk management and cybersecurity excellence. Hensley expressed his honor, crediting the support of his teammates, leaders, and partners for this achievement.

feed.title: Disney World sets date for Buzz Lightyear ride’s comeback
feed.summary: Walt Disney World has announced that Buzz Lightyear’s Space Ranger Spin in Magic Kingdom's Tomorrowland will reopen on April 8. The refurbished attraction will feature new ride vehicles, more targets, enhanced blasters, updated sound effects, and an original robot character named Buddy. These improvements aim to make the fan-favorite ride more interactive and immersive for guests.

feed.title: MDA 2026: Biogen, Sarepta, Edgewise Address Muscle Disorders
feed.summary: The 2026 Muscular Dystrophy Association (MDA) conference highlighted new developments from Biogen, Sarepta, and Edgewise in muscular dystrophy treatment. Biogen's salanersen showed significant reduction in a key SMA biomarker and is advancing to Phase 3. Edgewise Therapeutics presented positive long-term functional data for its Becker muscular dystrophy drug, sevasemten, from its MESA study, contributing to its ongoing pivotal trial. Sarepta Therapeutics provided a post-hoc analysis for its Duchenne muscular dystrophy exon-skippers, Vyondys 53 and Amondys 45, to support their full FDA approval and also shared positive 3-year data for its gene therapy Elevidys in ambulatory patients.

feed.title: Equifax (EFX) Adjusts VantageScore Pricing Amid Market Misinterp
feed.summary: Equifax (EFX), alongside TransUnion, has adjusted the pricing of VantageScore 4.0 to $1 per score, a move Jefferies interprets as promotional rather than a strategic shift. Despite recent volatility and mixed financial performance for Equifax, including strong financial health but declining margins, Jefferies maintains a positive outlook on FICO and anticipates aggressive stock buybacks. Equifax, a major credit bureau, is navigating the evolving credit score landscape, facing industry-specific risks and higher stock volatility.

feed.title: VGZ: HC Wainwright & Co. Lowers Price Target While Maintaining B
feed.summary: HC Wainwright & Co. has reiterated a "Buy" rating for Vista Gold (VGZ) but has lowered its price target by 10% to $4.50 from $5.00, effective March 12, 2026. This adjustment follows a previous increase in the price target in February 2026. Despite the change, the average target price from analysts for VGZ remains at $5.00, suggesting a significant upside from its current price.

feed.title: 40 UNDER 40: Graham Smith of Huntington Bank
feed.summary: Graham Smith of Huntington Bank has been recognized as one of Midland's "40 Under 40" for 2025. At 39, Smith works as a Business Banking Relationship Manager, serving clients in Midland and surrounding areas. He is actively involved in the community, serving on the Board of Directors for Family & Children’s Services of Mid-Michigan and as a past chair for MYPros Steering Committee.

feed.title: Honeywell (HON) Price Target Raised to $245 by Morgan Stanley | HON Stock News
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley has raised its price target for Honeywell (HON) to $245 from $235, maintaining an "Equal-Weight" rating. This update reflects a trend of recent analyst adjustments for HON, with other firms like Barclays, Jefferies, and Wolfe Research also modifying their ratings and price targets. Honeywell, a multi-industry conglomerate with a long history of innovation, is focusing on strategic portfolio changes and secular growth trends, with an average analyst target price of $248.00 and an "Outperform" consensus rating.

feed.title: Bristol Myers Squibb’s Sotyktu approved by US FDA for psoriatic arthritis
feed.summary: Bristol Myers Squibb's oral drug Sotyktu has received US FDA approval for treating adults with active psoriatic arthritis, marking a significant milestone as the first TYK2 inhibitor approved for this condition. The approval is based on positive results from two phase 3 trials demonstrating improvements in disease activity and health-related quality of life. Sotyktu is already approved for moderate-to-severe plaque psoriasis and is now recognized for its role in managing both skin and joint symptoms of psoriatic disease.

feed.title: BSX INVESTOR NOTICE: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP Reminds Boston Scientific (BSX) Investors of Securities Class Action Deadline on May 4, 2026 – Company Announcement - FT.com
feed.summary: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP reminds Boston Scientific (BSX) investors of the May 4, 2026 deadline to seek lead plaintiff status in a federal securities class action. The lawsuit alleges that Boston Scientific made misleading statements and failed to disclose issues with its U.S. EP segment's growth rate, leading to a significant stock price drop after the company announced underwhelming guidance for fiscal 2026. Investors who purchased BSX securities between July 23, 2025, and February 3, 2026, and suffered losses are encouraged to contact the law firm.

feed.title: Eco Wave Power Posts Strong 2025 Wave-Energy Milestones and Files Annual Report
feed.summary: Eco Wave Power (WAVE) filed its 2025 annual report, highlighting significant progress in wave energy projects, including grid connection in Israel and the launch of the first U.S. onshore wave energy project in Los Angeles. Despite a rise in annual operating expenses due to R&D and expansion, the company ended the year with a solid cash position and secured grant funding. Analyst ratings are cautious, with a "Hold" recommendation and a $4.50 price target, alongside a "Neutral" score from TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, due to financial performance concerns.

feed.title: Tractor Supply Steps Onto Rodeo’s Biggest Stage as Presenting Sponsor of the Wrangler National Finals Rodeo
feed.summary: Tractor Supply Company announced a multi-year sponsorship with the Professional Rodeo Cowboys Association (PRCA), becoming the presenting sponsor of the 2026 Wrangler National Finals Rodeo. This partnership solidifies Tractor Supply's commitment to supporting western sports at various levels and includes connecting with fans through media, in-arena presence, on-site activations, and PRCA athlete appearances at their stores. The company also supports the sport through partnerships with Cord McCoy, Teton Ridge, The Cowboy Channel, and its internal "Red Rider" program for employee competitors.

feed.title: Centrus Taps Palantir's AI To Supercharge America's Nuclear Comeback
feed.summary: Centrus Energy and Palantir Technologies have partnered to implement AI solutions to expand Centrus’ uranium enrichment capacity in the U.S. This collaboration, leveraging Palantir's Foundry and AIP, aims to significantly improve operational efficiency and decision-making, having already identified nearly $300 million in potential cost savings. The initiative supports America's nuclear comeback by reducing reliance on foreign enrichment providers.

feed.title: Inside the optical switch tests aiming to speed up AI data centers
feed.summary: Salience Labs and Keysight Technologies have announced a collaboration to develop the first optical circuit switch (OCS) testing environment, aiming to enhance AI data center infrastructure. The partnership will address the growing demand for scalable networking architectures in AI workloads by maximizing performance, decreasing latency, and reducing power consumption. This new testing solution, featuring Salience Labs' silicon photonics-based all-optical switching platform, will be showcased at the OFC 2026 conference.

feed.title: HP Inc. (HPQ.SW SIX) intraday CHF15.25 12 Mar 2026: Volume spike at support
feed.summary: HP Inc. (HPQ.SW) experienced a significant intraday price drop of 23.48% to CHF15.25 on March 12, 2026, accompanied by a substantial volume spike, signaling concentrated trading activity. Despite the immediate decline, Meyka AI rates HPQ.SW as a "BUY" with a score of 71.81 out of 100, citing strong cash flow yields but also highlighting balance sheet and margin pressures. The article suggests that traders are testing support near CHF15.00, with key risks including weak liquidity and sector-wide macro shocks.

feed.title: Huntington Bank is marking more than 160 years in business
feed.summary: Huntington Bank, founded in Columbus in 1866 by Pelatiah Webster Huntington, is celebrating over 160 years in business. The financial institution, which maintains its corporate headquarters in Columbus, has grown to include over 20,000 employees, 1,400 branches, and 1,600 ATMs across 21 states. Eric Heintschel, Huntington’s Northwest Ohio Market president, emphasizes that the bank's core purpose remains making lives better and helping communities thrive by focusing on local relationships and quality service.

feed.title: Portnoy Law Firm Announces Class Action on Behalf of Enphase Energy, Inc. Investors
feed.summary: The Portnoy Law Firm has announced a class action lawsuit against Enphase Energy, Inc. on behalf of investors who purchased securities between April 22, 2025, and October 28, 2025. The lawsuit alleges that Enphase Energy made misleading statements regarding its inventory management, ability to mitigate effects from the termination of the Residential Clean Energy Credit, and its financial prospects. Investors have until April 20, 2026, to file a lead plaintiff motion.

feed.title: UGG turns its cozy comfort into rugged warm-weather sneakers
feed.summary: UGG (a division of Deckers Brands, NYSE: DECK) has introduced its new Heritage Utility collection of sneakers for Spring 2026, designed to blend fashion and function for warmer weather. These men's sneakers, including the Heritage Utility Axoid and Sneaker Knoll models, feature breathable uppers, high-grip outsoles with Spider Rubber® Traction Pods, and durable materials, allowing the brand's comfort to be experienced all year long. The collection aims to offer utilitarian style and sophisticated design for an active, on-the-go lifestyle, with both versatility and fashion-forward options.
